PT
Textile Manufacturing

Prabhu Textiles

📍 Coimbatore, Tamil Nadu 👥 200–500 employees 🗓 Since 1998

Client Overview

Prabhu Textiles is one of Coimbatore's leading mid-size textile manufacturers with 4 production facilities and a direct export business. When they came to VAC, their operations were running entirely on Excel sheets and WhatsApp groups — creating daily chaos in inventory, production scheduling, and procurement.

The Challenge

With 4 disconnected factories, zero real-time inventory visibility, and a manual purchase order process taking up to 3 days, Prabhu Textiles was losing approximately ₹40 lakhs per month in waste, overstock, and production delays.

VAC's Solution

VAC deployed a unified manufacturing ERP across all 4 factories within 30 days. The system included real-time inventory management, automated purchase triggers, production scheduling boards, and a management dashboard visible to leadership from any device.

Results Delivered

40% Reduction in inventory waste
₹48L Saved in year one
30 days Full go-live
3 days→4hrs PO processing time

"VAC didn't just sell us software. They understood our factory floor and built a system our supervisors could actually use. The difference in 60 days was night and day."

Murugesan P. Managing Director, Prabhu Textiles

Engagement Details

Type ERP Implementation & Operations Consulting
Timeline 30 days implementation, ongoing support
Industry Textile Manufacturing
Location Coimbatore, Tamil Nadu

Services Delivered

  • ERP Deployment
  • Inventory Management
  • Production Scheduling
  • Procurement Automation
  • Staff Training
